title: SOL Experiment Protocol (Headless)
description: Machine-readable protocol for sol-core auto_run. Maps 1:1 to the experiment-protocol-template.md fields.

seriesName.description: Unique series identifier (used in filenames and run bundles).

invariants.description: Parameters held constant across all conditions.

graph.description: Path to graph JSON, or 'default' for the canonical 140-node graph.

knobs.description: Independent variables. Each key maps to a list of values to sweep. If empty or omitted, a single condition is run using invariant values.

injections.description: Ordered list of injections. Each fires at a specific step (default: step 0).

steps.description: Total simulation steps per condition per rep.

baseline.description: 'restore' = snapshot before injections, restore between reps. 'fresh' = full engine reset between reps.

metrics_every.description: Record per-step metrics every N steps. Set higher for long runs to reduce output.

falsifiers.description: What results would disprove the intended interpretation.
